items.title: Poisoning Fine-tuning Datasets of Constitutional Classifiers
items.snippet: We study the conditions needed for a backdoor, installed in a constitutional classifier via fine-tuning data poisoning, to evade black-box red-teaming.

items.title: Introspection Adapters: Training LLMs to Report Their Learned Behaviors
items.snippet:
We introduce introspection adapters (IA), a technique for training an LLM to self-report behaviors
                    it learned during fine-tuning. This IA generalizes to models that were fine-tuned in very different
                    ways.
